title: DrakonScale SMP LITE Server Pack
description: The official Lite server pack for DrakonScale SMP!
body:
This is the official Lite Minecraft pack for the Isle of Berk-based Roleplay Server, DrakonScale MC!

Main mods include:

Isle of Berk

Archipelago Additions

Off The Grid Dragons

Dred's Dragons

Hybrids Plus

and Infernos!

Train dragons and soar through the skies, or stay rooted on the ground and expand an empire! The choice is yours and the world is your oyster.
